productDisplayName: Nike Women As Statement White T-Shirts
description: Composition White polo t-shirt made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline and is engineered with Dri-Fit technology Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean No matter how long the match goes on, you'll stand hard in this sun-blocking nike Statement tennis t-shirt. Replete with fetaures like sweat-wicking technology and stretch fit for a front-to-back range of motion that covers every angle, this tee looks great when paired with a tennis skirt or Dri-Fit capris.
